name: Dog Cage for New Born, for Adult Dog, Cat Monkey, Rabbit Dog, Bird, Cat, Hamster, Miniature Pig, Monkey, Rabbit, Mouse Cage XL-012
description: Ideal for both puppies and adult dogs, the Foodie Puppies single-door folding metal crate offers exceptional convenience. Use the metal dog crate for anything from potty training or house training to reinforcing house rules and boundaries-or simply as a safe, secure place for your pooch to rest and relax.
